name: node-app-advisor
description: Critically analyzes a Node.js application to find architectural, design, security, performance, and technical-debt issues, then writes two report files. Single skill (`node-app-advisor`) that runs a phased workflow — Phase 1 orient, Phase 2 scope, Phase 3 analyze five areas (architecture & design, security & dependencies, performance & configuration, testing & API, technical debt), Phase 4 Findings Report, Phase 5 Remediation Backlog with exact before/after code changes. Each area's detection playbook lives in an internal reference file; no user-invocable sub-skills. Supports Express, Fastify, NestJS, Koa, Hono, Next.js (API routes), and tRPC, in JavaScript or TypeScript (web, API, worker, CLI).
